name: Impossible Chicken Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Grease a ten-inch pie plate.
3. Mix together the cooked chicken, peas, carrots, mushrooms, and onion in the pie plate.
4. In a blender, beat the remaining ingredients until smooth for about 15 seconds.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 30-35 minutes.
7. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
